notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Brady House. William Contreras scores. Gary Sánchez to 3rd. Jake Bauers to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Brady House. William Contreras scores. Gary Sánchez to 3rd. Jake Bauers to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brady House GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brady House grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. James Wood out at 2nd. Brady House out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Keibert Ruiz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Keibert Ruiz grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Nasim Nuñez out at 2nd. Keibert Ruiz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lockridge reaches on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Tena hits a ground-rule double (2) on a line drive to left-center field.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. flies out to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Daylen Lile reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile reaches on a fielding error by third baseman David Hamilton. Jacob Young to 2nd.
